allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''scidb-matlab/src''\); from scidb_matlab.bridge import load_and_extract; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(load_and_extract\)\)")

Bash(echo "=== Root tests \(scidb layer\) ===" && ls /workspace/sci-matlab/tests/matlab/*.m | xargs -I{} basename {} && echo "" && echo "=== scihist/ tests ===" && ls /workspace/sci-matlab/tests/matlab/scihist/*.m | xargs -I{} basename {})
Bash(git mv scidb/src/scidb scidb/src/scidb && git mv scidb/src/scidb.egg-info scidb/src/scidb.egg-info)
Bash(git mv "sci-matlab/src/sci_matlab/matlab/+scidb" "sci-matlab/src/sci_matlab/matlab/+scidb" && git mv sci-matlab/tests/matlab/scidb sci-matlab/tests/matlab/scidb)

Bash(\\
  git mv scidb/src/scidb scidb/src/scidb && \\
  git mv scidb/src/scidb.egg-info scidb/src/scidb.egg-info && \\
  git mv scidb-net/src/scidbnet scidb-net/src/scidbnet && \\
  git mv "sci-matlab/src/sci_matlab/matlab/+scidb" "sci-matlab/src/sci_matlab/matlab/+scidb" && \\
  git mv sci-matlab/tests/matlab/scidb sci-matlab/tests/matlab/scidb)

Bash(for dir in sciduck scirun-lib scihist-lib scidb path-gen pipelinedb-lib canonical-hash scifor scilineage sci-matlab scidb-net; do
  echo "=== $dir ==="
  echo "pyproject.toml name:"
  grep -m1 '^name' /workspace/$dir/pyproject.toml 2>/dev/null || echo "no pyproject.toml"
  echo "README.md first heading:"
  head -5 /workspace/$dir/README.md 2>/dev/null | grep -m1 '^#' || echo "no heading"
  echo ""
done)
